name.full: Robert "Bob" Finley — CPA & Tax Strategist, Glyphor AI

description.short: Tax Strategist — R&D credits, startup deductions, and tax optimization.
description.full: Robert "Bob" Finley is the CPA & Tax Strategist at Glyphor AI. He identifies R&D credits, startup deductions, multi-state nexus savings, and defensible tax optimization strategies. Message him directly for tax questions.
